channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ADMANUM] Ad-Manum Finance Ltd: Vanshika Agarwal Acquires 5.324% Equity Shares Through Transmission of Shares
item.description:
Ad-Manum Finance Ltd has announced that Vanshika Agarwal, a promoter of the company, has acquired 5.324% equity shares of the company. The acquisition was made through the transmission of 3,99,310 equity shares held by Late Mrs. Neenadevi Agarwal. The transaction took place on March 30, 2026, at an assuming price of INR 50.47 per share, amounting to INR 2,01,53,175.7. This acquisition has increased Vanshika Agarwal's holding to 13.404% from the previous 8.084%.

  • Vanshika Agarwal, a promoter of Ad-Manum Finance Ltd, has acquired 5.324% equity shares of the company.
  • The acquisition was made through the transmission of 3,99,310 equity shares held by Late Mrs. Neenadevi Agarwal.
  • The transaction took place on March 30, 2026, at an assuming price of INR 50.47 per share, amounting to INR 2,01,53,175.7.
  • This acquisition has increased Vanshika Agarwal's holding to 13.404% from the previous 8.084%.
  • Ad-Manum Finance Ltd's total voting capital is INR 7,50,00,000 (Rupees Seven Crore Fifty Lakh Only)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AD-MANUM FINANCE LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ETHOSLTD] Ethos Limited Inaugurates New Watch Boutique in Jodhpur
item.description:
Ethos Limited has announced the inauguration of a new Ethos Watch Boutique in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. The boutique, located at Upper Ground Floor, UG, Shop No.02, K Mall, Plot 13-18, Pali Road, Sushil Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan, 342003, is a significant milestone in strengthening Ethos' luxury brand portfolio and further consolidates its presence in one of India’s most prominent luxury retail markets. This launch brings the total number of Ethos boutiques across India to 94.

  • Ethos Limited has inaugurated a new Ethos Watch Boutique in Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
  • The new boutique is located at Upper Ground Floor, UG, Shop No.02, K Mall, Plot 13-18, Pali Road, Sushil Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan, 342003.
  • This launch strengthens Ethos' luxury brand portfolio and consolidates its presence in the luxury retail market.
  • Ethos now has 94 boutiques across India.
  • The new boutique makes the world’s most exclusive brands more accessible to discerning customers in India, in line with Ethos' strategic vision of delivering unparalleled luxury experiences.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ethos Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RITCO] Ritco Logistics Ltd: No New Encumbrances of Shares by Promoters as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
Ritco Logistics Ltd has disclosed under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011, that its promoters have not made any new encumbrances of shares, directly or indirectly, other than those already disclosed to the Stock Exchanges during the financial year ended 31st March 2026. The number of encumbered or pledged shares by promoters as of March 31, 2026, is nil.

  • Ritco Logistics Ltd promoters have not made any new encumbrances of shares as of March 31, 2026.
  • The number of encumbered or pledged shares by promoters as of March 31, 2026, is nil.
  • Disclosure made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ritco Logistics Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [ETHOSLTD] Ethos Limited Inaugurates New Watch Boutique in Mumbai
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ethos Limited has announced the inauguration of a new Ethos Watch Boutique in Mumbai, Maharashtra. The boutique, located at Ground Floor, Shop no. 2, Hormuz Mansion, Bhulabhai Desai Marg, Breach Candy, is a significant milestone in strengthening the company's luxury brand portfolio and further consolidates its presence in one of India’s most prominent luxury retail markets. This launch aligns with Ethos Limited’s strategic vision of delivering unparalleled luxury experiences. The company now has 93 boutiques across India.

  • Ethos Limited has inaugurated a new Ethos Watch Boutique in Mumbai, Maharashtra.
  • The new boutique is located at a prominent location in Mumbai.
  • This launch aligns with Ethos Limited’s strategic vision of delivering unparalleled luxury experiences.
  • Ethos Limited now has 93 boutiques across India.
  • The new boutique strengthens Ethos Limited's luxury brand portfolio and consolidates its presence in the Indian luxury retail market.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ethos Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MADHUVEER] Madhuveer Com 18 Network Ltd Goes Live on Airtel Xstream Platform
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Madhuveer Com 18 Network Ltd has successfully completed the integration of its streaming platform JOJO App with Airtel Digital Limited through its Airtel Xstream platform. The API servers required to serve content metadata and updates have been fully developed, tested, and deployed in the production environment. The integration has been successfully implemented, and the services are now live across the Airtel Xstream ecosystem. This ensures JOJO App’s availability to the vast Airtel user base, marking a significant step in expanding the Company's digital distribution presence across Airtel's ecosystem and network.

  • Madhuveer Com 18 Network Ltd integrates JOJO App with Airtel Xstream platform
  • API servers for content metadata and updates fully developed and deployed
  • JOJO App now live across Airtel Xstream ecosystem
  • Expansion of the Company's digital distribution presence
  • Availability of JOJO App to Airtel's vast user base

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Madhuveer Com 18 Network Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [CHOLAFIN] Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd to Approve Q4 and FY26 Financial Results on April 30, 2026
item.description:
Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 30, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended 31 March, 2026. The company's trading window for designated persons will be closed from 1 April, 2026, to 2 May, 2026, in connection with the impending publication of these financial results.

  • Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd to hold a Board meeting on April 30, 2026
  • The meeting will consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26
  • The financial results are scheduled to be published on 30 April, 2026
  • The company's trading window for designated persons will be closed from 1 April, 2026, to 2 May, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VERTEX] Vertex Securities Ltd: Kumar Nair's Voting Rights Reduced from 19.16% to 15.32%
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Kumar Nair. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of shares in Vertex Securities Limited. Before the acquisition, Kumar Nair held 19.16% of the total share/voting capital. After the acquisition, his holding has been reduced to 15.32%. This reduction in voting rights is due to the renunciation of Rights Entitlement in the Rights Issue resulting in a reduction in voting power.

  • Kumar Nair's voting rights in Vertex Securities Ltd have been reduced from 19.16% to 15.32%.
  • This reduction is due to the renunciation of Rights Entitlement in the Rights Issue.
  • Before the acquisition, Kumar Nair held 19.16% of the total share/voting capital.
  • After the acquisition, his holding has been reduced to 15.32%.
  • The acquisition is in accordance with the Rights Issue process.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VERTEX SECURITIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CENTRALBK] Central Bank of India Releases Statement of Outstanding Bonds for Half Year Ended 31.03.2026
item.description:
The Central Bank of India has released a statement of outstanding bonds for the half year ended 31.03.2026. The statement was issued in accordance with the SEBI Circular no. SEBI Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54 dated May 22, 2024. The bank has issued bonds worth ₹ 1500 crore, all of which are still outstanding. The bonds have a coupon rate of 8.80% and a maturity date of 30-08-2033. The bank also has a call option date on 30-08-2028. The statement has been sent to the National Securities Depository Limited, Mumbai and Central Depository Services (India) Limited, Mumbai.

  • Central Bank of India releases statement of outstanding bonds for half year ended 31.03.2026
  • Bonds worth ₹ 1500 crore issued, all of which are still outstanding
  • Coupon rate of 8.80%
  • Maturity date of 30-08-2033
  • Call option date on 30-08-2028

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTRAL BANK OF INDIA | Category: Investment

item.title: [SICAPIT] SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd Confirms Non-Applicability of SEBI Circular for Fund Raising
item.description:
SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd has announced that it does not fall within the category of ‘Large Corporate’ as per the SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated November 26, 2018. This confirmation is in regard to fund raising by issuance of debt securities. The non-applicability is for the year ending March 31, 2026.

  • SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd confirmed its non-applicability under the SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated November 26, 2018
  • The non-applicability is in regard to fund raising by issuance of debt securities
  • SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd does not fall within the category of ‘Large Corporate’ as per the SEBI circular
  • This confirmation is for the year ending March 31, 2026
  • The announcement was made to ensure accurate records and compliance with the SEBI circular

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SI CAPITAL & FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [EMERALD] Emerald Finance Partners with Agro Foods to Offer Early-Wage-Access Program
item.description:
Emerald Finance Ltd has partnered with Agro Foods, Mohali, Punjab, to offer its Early-Wage-Access program to the employees of the firm. This initiative aims to provide instant financial relief to the employees by allowing them to access part of their salaries seamlessly throughout the month. The company, in line with its vision to expand its offerings and to serve retail customers at large, had been working on a salary advance solution. This product entails tying up with employers to offer short term loans as salary advance, which are then collected through salary deduction.

  • Emerald Finance has partnered with Agro Foods to offer an Early-Wage-Access program.
  • The program aims to provide instant financial relief to Agro Foods' employees.
  • Emerald Finance's salary advance solution allows employees to access part of their salaries throughout the month.
  • The company collects the lent amount through salary deduction.
  • This initiative aligns with Emerald Finance's vision to expand its offerings and serve retail customers at large.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Emerald Leasing Finance & Investment Company Ltd | Category: Partnership
